name: sqlbroker
description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code. Cross-platform: Windows Task Scheduler / Linux systemd / macOS launchd. Passwords are encrypted with a per-install random AES-128-CBC + HMAC key (master.key) so the service can decrypt regardless of run-context (SYSTEM / root / user). The conversation never carries credentials. v2.3 auto-migrates v1 (DPAPI) and v2.0-2.2 (keyring) aliases on first start.
